title: calanthe tsoongiana var. guizhouensis
intro: Calanthe tsoongiana var. guizhouensis, also known as Guizhou calanthe, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to China. It is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Traditionally, Guizhou calanthe is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues.
